states.emptyHint: When you add records, they will show up in this list.

bulk.actionsHint: Pick rows below, then choose what to do with them.
bulk.noSelection: Select a few rows to enable bulk actions.

exportCsv.label: Export visible (CSV)
exportCsv.downloadingHint: Preparing a CSV download for the current view.
exportCsv.emptyHint: Nothing to export yet — adjust filters or select rows.

helper.loadFailed: Club list could not be loaded.
helper.noneVisible: No clubs are visible to this account yet.
helper.select: Choose a club to load tenant-scoped data.

banner.loadTitle: Club context could not be restored
banner.loadBody: The app could not load the clubs available to this account. Refresh the club list or reopen Settings to inspect access.
banner.emptyPlatformBody: This platform admin account is signed in, but no clubs are currently visible. Confirm the staging seed ran against the active database and that tenants exist.
banner.emptyClubBody: This staff account is signed in, but no club memberships are currently visible. Confirm the staging seed created the expected club-admin membership.
banner.selectionBody: Your account can see clubs, but no active club context is selected right now.

errors.needTenant: Select a club in the header.
errors.noBranches: Add a sport branch in the database first.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Operational follow-up that needs attention now.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: The daily operating snapshot for your club.
dashboard.cardOpsBody: Plan sessions, take attendance quickly, and keep the weekly rhythm visible.
dashboard.cardPeopleBody: Athletes, guardians, groups, and teams stay connected in one calm workspace.
dashboard.cardFinanceBody: Reusable charge items and assigned athlete fees stay explicit and easy to maintain.
dashboard.needTenant: Choose a club to load the command center.
dashboard.financeBody: Track what is overdue, what was collected recently, and who still needs follow-up.
dashboard.scheduleBody: See upcoming workload by group and keep schedule changes visible before they become attendance issues.
dashboard.attendanceBody: Spot the latest pattern quickly so coaches and staff can react early.

headline.attentionBody: Open balance is {{overdueTotal}} overdue · {{collectedTotal}} collected so far · {{upcomingSessions}} upcoming sessions to keep on track.
headline.calmBody: Collected {{collectedTotal}} this period and only {{todayCount}} items are due today.

drilldown.title: Move from a number to a list with one click.
drilldown.subtitle: These cards open the Report Builder pre-filtered for the most common follow-up flows.
drilldown.financeOverdueBody: All charges past their due date, sorted by remaining amount.
drilldown.outstandingBody: Athletes who currently owe the club money — highest first.
drilldown.teamlessBody: Active athletes not on any team — useful for assignment days.
drilldown.lessonsBody: 1-to-1 sessions waiting on the calendar — easy daily prep.
drilldown.byGroupBody: Where the financial follow-up actually concentrates.
drilldown.byCoachBody: Lesson count and remaining billing by coach.

dashboard.commandCenterHint: Keep coaching, scheduling, and finance follow-up in one operational overview.
dashboard.recentCollectionsHint: Check the latest payment tempo before you follow up with families.
dashboard.coachesHint: See which active coaches are available for groups, teams, and upcoming work.
dashboard.privateLessonsHint: Watch the next 1-to-1 workload and billing exposure in the same command center.
dashboard.familyWorkflowHint: See which family-facing loops are still open before they drift into manual follow-up.
dashboard.actionCenterHint: See the most important operational follow-up without hunting across multiple screens.
dashboard.actionCenterEmpty: No active action-center items are visible right now.

context.platformBody_one: You can inspect {{count}} visible club from the same shell and switch context intentionally before testing each flow.
context.platformBody_other: You can inspect {{count}} visible clubs from the same shell and switch context intentionally before testing each flow.
context.clubBody: You are working inside a single club context. The dashboard, reports, finance, and communications surfaces all reflect this club only.
context.switchHint: Use the club switcher in the header or the catalog below to move between seeded demo clubs without leaving the app shell.
context.clubReadyHint: This account is already scoped to one club, so the main testing surfaces should load seeded club data directly.
context.snapshotHint: A quick operational summary confirms that the selected club is populated and ready for demo flows.
context.clubCatalogHint: Platform admins can inspect the seeded club landscape here before switching into a specific club context.
context.attentionHint: See which clubs need follow-through first, then switch directly into the right tenant-scoped workflow.
context.attentionEmpty: No visible clubs currently show action-center load.

athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.subtitle: Roster and participation, built for clarity.
athletes.intakeSubtitle: Structured intake for prospects, trials, and active club members.
athletes.editSubtitle: Keep lifecycle, group fit, and family readiness current.
athletes.emptyHint: Add your first athlete to see them here.

photo.hintEmpty: A friendly face makes it easier to recognise athletes across the platform.
photo.hintWithPhoto: Replace or remove the current photo whenever it stops feeling right.
photo.constraints: JPG, PNG, WEBP, or GIF — up to 5 MB.
photo.errorType: Use a JPG, PNG, WEBP, or GIF image.
photo.errorSize: Photo is larger than 5 MB. Try a smaller image.
photo.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while updating the photo. Please try again.

athletes.name: Athlete
athletes.teamsHint: Optional squad assignments. Training group stays on the profile.
athletes.teamFilterHint: Showing athletes with an active membership in {{team}}.
athletes.primaryGroupHint: Groups are training cohorts. Team assignment stays optional.
athletes.branchHint: Choose the branch first so groups and optional team paths stay aligned.
athletes.branchReadyHint: {{branch}} is selected. Group and team options will follow this branch.
athletes.intakeIntro: Start with the athlete's basic profile, group fit, and lifecycle status. Guardians, optional team membership, and finance follow-up can be completed right after saving.
athletes.editIntro: Use this form to keep branch, group, and lifecycle status aligned with the athlete's current club journey.
athletes.statusGuideTrial: Use Trial for athletes who are currently evaluating fit before full activation.
athletes.statusGuideActive: Use Active when the athlete is participating normally in club operations.
athletes.statusGuidePaused: Use Paused when the athlete is expected to return but should remain visible for follow-up.
athletes.statusGuideInactive: Use Inactive when participation has stopped and only limited follow-up is needed.
athletes.statusGuideArchived: Use Archived for historical profiles that should no longer appear in day-to-day operations.
athletes.enrollmentSubtitle: See whether this athlete is ready for normal daily operations.
athletes.enrollmentHint: This uses the current profile, guardians, group, optional team assignment, and finance signals instead of creating a separate enrollment bureaucracy.
athletes.readinessGuardianMissing: No primary contact is linked yet.
athletes.readinessGroupMissing: No primary group is set yet.
athletes.readinessTeamOptional: No team assigned. This is valid for group-only athletes.
athletes.readinessFinanceReady: No open balance blocks the current follow-up loop.
athletes.nextActionsClear: This athlete is ready for normal day-to-day follow-up.
athletes.lifecycleHint: Use focused status changes and group moves without leaving the athlete workspace.
athletes.lifecycleTeamResetHint: Changing the primary group can end team memberships that no longer match the new group.
athletes.bulkHint: Apply safe status or primary-group changes to a reviewed selection.
athletes.bulkActionStatusAndGroup: Set status to {{status}} and move the roster to {{group}}.
athletes.bulkActionPreviewIdle: Choose a status, a primary group move, or both before applying the bulk action.
athletes.bulkSafetyNote: Team memberships outside the new primary group are ended automatically, and inactive or archived athletes are removed from active team rosters.
athletes.bulkEndedTeams_one: {{count}} active team membership was ended to keep roster data consistent.
athletes.bulkEndedTeams_other: {{count}} active team memberships were ended to keep roster data consistent.

familyActions.title: Family action queue
familyActions.hint: Create controlled follow-up requests, track responses, and keep approval steps visible without letting submissions overwrite club records instantly.
familyActions.readinessLabel: Family self-service loop is under control
familyActions.readinessClear: No open family-facing workflow blocks this athlete right now.
familyActions.requestDescription: What needs to be completed or confirmed?
familyActions.portalRejected: Guardian submission sent back for another family response.

athletes.inventoryHint: Items currently checked out to this athlete from club stock.
athletes.inventoryEmpty: No club inventory is currently assigned to this athlete.

guardians.title: Guardians
guardians.subtitle: Parents and trusted contacts, managed as reusable club records.
guardians.emptyHint: Add a guardian once and reuse them across athlete profiles.
guardians.name: Guardian
guardians.linkedAthletesHint: See each athlete connected to this guardian and how they are listed.
guardians.linkedCreateHint: Create the guardian and link them to the athlete in one step.
guardians.noAthletesHint: Open an athlete profile to connect this guardian.
guardians.bulkHint: Select reviewed guardians to export, remove, or prepare a warm follow-up.
guardians.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete the selected guardians? Linked guardians stay in place.

familyReadiness.title: Family readiness
familyReadiness.subtitle: See whether this guardian still owes information, has athlete actions pending, or needs staff review.

portalAccess.title: Portal access
portalAccess.hint: Invite this guardian into the controlled family portal without exposing staff-only data.
portalAccess.missingEmail: Add an email address before enabling guardian portal access.
portalAccess.notEnabled: Guardian portal access has not been enabled yet.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Training cohorts and age buckets — separate from teams.
groups.memberHint: Athletes set a primary group on their profile; teams are optional.
groups.emptyHint: Groups from your branch catalog will appear here.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Squads and competitive units linked to branches.
teams.emptyHint: Teams from your branch setup will appear here.
teams.structureHint: Teams are optional squads inside or alongside groups. Athletes can stay group-only.
teams.structureBody: Use teams for match squads or focused sub-groups without forcing every athlete into one.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.subtitle: Operational coaching roster for planning, private lessons, and accountability.
coaches.emptyHint: Add your first coach to start assigning groups, teams, sessions, and private lessons.
coaches.searchPlaceholder: Search coach, phone, email, or specialty

training.title: Training sessions
training.subtitle: Calendar-aware planning for groups and optional teams.
training.emptyHint: Create a session to start recording attendance.
training.attendanceHint: Mark the roster quickly and keep the whole session visible at a glance.
training.groupTeamHint: Sessions belong to a group and can optionally target one team inside that group.
training.groupHint: Choose the main training cohort for this session.
training.teamHint: Leave empty for a full-group session.
training.rosterTruncatedHint: We loaded the first {{count}} athletes for this session. If your roster is larger than that, narrow the audience by team before marking attendance.
training.boardHint: Scan the week fast, then jump straight into attendance or session actions.
training.bulkHint: Use safe bulk changes for planned sessions only.
training.seriesHint: Create the smallest useful repeated pattern instead of adding sessions one by one.
training.seriesSkipped_one: {{count}} matching session already existed and was skipped.
training.seriesSkipped_other: {{count}} matching sessions already existed and were skipped.
training.emptyWindowHint: No sessions are visible between {{from}} and {{to}}. The default weekly window can hide seeded sessions if you are testing outside the seeded date range.
training.emptyFilteredHint: No sessions match the current filters between {{from}} and {{to}}. Widen the date range or clear the filters to confirm seeded sessions are available.

privateLessons.title: Private lessons
privateLessons.subtitle: Plan, track, and charge 1-to-1 coaching without forcing it through group-session workflows.
privateLessons.emptyHint: Create a private lesson to track coach time, attendance, and related billing.
privateLessons.search: Search athlete, coach, note, or location
privateLessons.financeHint: Use private lessons for premium 1-to-1 work, then jump into finance or communications from the same operating loop.
privateLessons.profileHint: Private lesson history gives staff one clear view of coaching, attendance, and billing for this athlete.

communications.title: Communications
communications.subtitle: Build a clear outreach audience from operations and finance data without overbuilding messaging infrastructure.
communications.emptyHint: Adjust the filters to build a clear target list for families or athletes.
communications.searchPlaceholder: Search athlete, guardian, team, group, phone, or email
communications.audienceHint: Review who is included and why before you draft or export anything.
communications.draftHint: Prepare the subject, body, and contact list here, then copy into your delivery channel of choice.
communications.defaultDraftBody:
Hello,

We are reaching out with an operational update from the club.

Please review the items below and let us know if you need support.

Thank you.
communications.contactListHint: Copy-friendly guardian lines for email, WhatsApp, SMS, or internal follow-up.
communications.noContactLines: No contact lines available for the current audience.
communications.quickHint: See the main family-facing signals for this athlete before you call or message anyone.
communications.signalFamilyActions: {{pending}} family actions pending · {{review}} waiting for review
communications.financeHint: Use the audience builder to turn overdue or outstanding balances into a clean family contact list.
communications.emptyFilteredHint: No audience matches the current filter set. Clear filters or widen the targeting rules to confirm the seeded communication audience is available.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Collections, balances, and club-side fee operations in one clear workspace.
finance.advancedExplorerHint: Filter, sort, and export charges with the same advanced builder used in the Report builder.
finance.hubBody: Define reusable fee types, assign charges, then record collections against the right athlete balances.
finance.hubChecklist1: Define reusable fee items once, then keep labels and defaults consistent.
finance.hubChecklist2: Assign charges in bulk when the same fee applies across a roster or group.
finance.hubChecklist3: Record real collections so paid, partial, unpaid, and overdue states stay trustworthy.
finance.bulkAssignBody: Select a charge item, choose athletes, and assign fees in one pass.
finance.summaryHint: Understand what is owed, what is overdue, and what was just collected without leaving finance.
finance.totalChargedHint: All assigned fees currently on the books.
finance.totalOutstandingHint: Open balances that still need action.
finance.totalOverdueHint: Balances that are both open and past due.
finance.priorityCollectionsHint: Combine finance urgency with people context before reaching out.
finance.noPriorityCollections: No priority collections at the moment.
finance.recentCollectionsCount: {{count}} collections were recorded in the recent activity feed.
finance.privateLessonCollectionsHint: Track unpaid or missed 1-to-1 work before it turns into staff confusion.
finance.noPrivateLessonCollections: No private lesson follow-up needed right now.

chargeItems.title: Charge items
chargeItems.subtitle: Reusable fee definitions (dues, camp, kit, …).
chargeItems.name: Name
chargeItems.cannotDelete: Charge items in use should be deactivated instead of deleted.

athleteCharges.title: Athlete charges
athleteCharges.subtitle: Fees assigned to individual athletes, with real balance and overdue visibility.
athleteCharges.quickAssignHint: Create a charge directly from the athlete profile.
athleteCharges.profileHint: Recent charges stay visible here so staff can confirm status quickly.
athleteCharges.bulkHint: Assign one charge item to a reviewed roster, a primary group, or an active team scope.
athleteCharges.bulkScopeHint: Use status scope for group/team targeting so paused or inactive athletes are not charged silently.
athleteCharges.bulkTargetSummarySelected_one: {{count}} reviewed athlete will receive the charge.
athleteCharges.bulkTargetSummarySelected_other: {{count}} reviewed athletes will receive the charge.
athleteCharges.bulkTargetSummaryGroup: Eligible athletes in {{group}} will receive the charge.
athleteCharges.bulkTargetSummaryTeam: Eligible active members in {{team}} will receive the charge.
athleteCharges.periodicHint: Generate recurring monthly or period-based charges safely without creating duplicates for the same athlete and fee item.
athleteCharges.statusManagedByPayments: Paid and partial states are now derived from recorded collections.
athleteCharges.periodicTargetSummaryGroup: All eligible athletes in {{group}} will be checked.
athleteCharges.periodicTargetSummaryTeam: All eligible athletes in {{team}} will be checked.
athleteCharges.periodicDuplicateWarning: already has a charge for this period
athleteCharges.periodicNoDuplicates: No duplicate charges were found for this period.
athleteCharges.paymentHint: Allocate one real payment across the selected athlete's open charges so balances stay trustworthy.
athleteCharges.recentPaymentsHint: Use the latest collection activity as a follow-up checkpoint.

payments.title: Collections
payments.subtitle: Record payments against athlete charges and keep balances trustworthy.
payments.recordHint: Apply one payment to one athlete's open charges. Partial allocations are supported.
payments.selectAthleteFirst: Choose an athlete to load open charges.
payments.allocationExceeded: Allocation cannot exceed the remaining amount.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Operational and financial visibility for scheduling, attendance, and collections.
reports.readyHint: These report surfaces now summarize live operating data for managers and staff.
reports.commandCenterHint: Use this page for manager visibility and finance follow-up, not analytics theater.

collections.title: Collections overview
collections.body: Outstanding, overdue, and recently collected money in one place.

scheduling.title: Scheduling overview
scheduling.body: See upcoming workload by group and keep the week coordinated.

balances.title: Athlete balances
balances.body: Find the athletes who still need action on assigned charges.

privateLessons.title: Private lesson operations
privateLessons.body: Track 1-to-1 workload, attendance, and related billing from the same command center.

communications.title: Communication targeting
communications.body: Turn training and finance signals into a clear family outreach audience.

commandCenter.title: Command center
commandCenter.outstandingHint: Total balance still waiting for action.
commandCenter.overdueHint: Open balance that is already past due.
commandCenter.overdueChargesHint: See the finance priority before you contact families.
commandCenter.recentCollectionsHint: Check whether collection activity is keeping pace.
commandCenter.noOutstandingHint: There is no high-priority finance follow-up right now.
commandCenter.noOverdueHint: No urgent overdue items are visible right now.
commandCenter.noPaymentsHint: Newly recorded collections will show here.
commandCenter.privateLessonsHint: Watch upcoming 1-to-1 work and spot the lessons that still need follow-up.
commandCenter.noPrivateLessonsHint: Planned and completed private lessons will show up here.
commandCenter.communicationHint: Audience counts help staff understand how large the next family outreach batch will be.

reports.privateLessonsHint: Watch the next 1-to-1 workload and billing exposure in the same command center.
reports.communicationsHint: Turn operations and finance signals into a clear target audience for family outreach.

launch.title: Move from signal to a calm next step.
launch.subtitle: Open the curated starters, jump back into a saved view, or build something new — all from the same calm workspace.
launch.saveExportTitle: Save & export when you need to
launch.saveExportBody: Filter, group, and save useful views. Export to CSV when finance or family follow-up needs a paper trail.
launch.openBuilderBody: Open a blank explorer, pick an entity, and craft a custom list with filters or grouping.
launch.openGroupedBody: Use a grouped starter to see lowest attendance groups or coach load without writing measures by hand.

reports.continueTitle: Pick up where you left off
reports.continueHint: Recently updated saved views, ready to open in one tap.
reports.continueEmptyHint: Save a filtered or grouped report and it will reappear here next time.

familyWorkflow.title: Family workflow
familyWorkflow.hint: Use the same command center to track pending family responses, staff review queues, and recently active requests.
familyWorkflow.empty: No family workflow items need attention.
familyWorkflow.emptyHint: When staff creates or reviews family requests, the queue will appear here.

actionCenter.title: Action center
actionCenter.hint: A single operational backlog for finance, family workflow, readiness, and scheduling attention.
actionCenter.empty: No active action-center items right now.
actionCenter.emptyHint: As follow-up signals appear, they will be grouped here.

builder.title: Advanced filter
builder.subtitle: Combine simple conditions to build very specific lists. Match all, match any, or exclude.
builder.empty: No conditions yet — add one to refine the list.

explorer.columnsHint: Pick which columns appear in the table and CSV export.
explorer.emptyHint: Loosen a filter or clear it entirely to broaden the list.

savedViews.title: Saved views
savedViews.privateHint: Only you can see this view.
savedViews.sharedHint: Visible to every staff member in this club.
savedViews.dialogHelper: Give this report a friendly name so the next teammate (or the next-week version of you) understands what it is for.
savedViews.name: Name
savedViews.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain when to open this view and what to do with it.
savedViews.firstRun: Save filtered views with one click — they show up here next time you open the explorer.

aggregate.title: Group & summarize
aggregate.subtitle: Pick one dimension and one or more lightweight measures. Counts are automatic.
aggregate.columnsHiddenWhileGrouped: Column picker is hidden while grouping is active.
aggregate.notSupported: This entity does not have any group-friendly fields yet.

starter.panelSubtitle: Skip the blank canvas — these are real club workflows you can run, duplicate, and save as your own.

activeWithoutTeam.title: Active athletes without a team
activeWithoutTeam.description: Active athletes who are not on any team yet — perfect for assignment days.

trialFollowUp.title: Trial athletes awaiting decision
trialFollowUp.description: Trialists still in the consideration phase. Reach out, decide, or convert.

outstandingBalance.title: Athletes with outstanding balance
outstandingBalance.description: Anyone who currently owes the club money, sorted by amount.

unpaidPrivateLessons.title: Unpaid private lesson fees
unpaidPrivateLessons.description: Athletes with at least one private-lesson charge that is not fully paid.

femaleShirtSizeM.title: Female athletes — shirt size M
femaleShirtSizeM.description: A demo of multi-condition filtering used for kit and uniform planning.

byGroup.title: Athlete count by group
byGroup.description: How is the roster distributed across groups right now?

byGender.title: Athlete count by gender
byGender.description: Quick gender mix snapshot of active and trial athletes.

outstandingByGroup.title: Outstanding balance by group
outstandingByGroup.description: Where the financial follow-up actually concentrates.

contactGaps.title: Guardians missing contact info
contactGaps.description: Guardians whose phone or email is not yet captured.

unlinked.title: Guardians not linked to an athlete
unlinked.description: Likely incomplete records — connect them or archive them.

upcoming.title: Upcoming planned private lessons
upcoming.description: Planned 1-to-1 sessions, sorted by date — easy daily prep.

unbilled.title: Private lessons not billed yet
unbilled.description: Lessons that need a charge before invoicing the family.

byCoach.title: Private lesson workload by coach
byCoach.description: Lesson count and remaining billing by coach.

overdue.title: Overdue charges
overdue.description: Open balances past their due date, sorted by remaining amount.

outstandingByItem.title: Outstanding balance by charge item
outstandingByItem.description: Where the open money is concentrated by item.

overdueByCategory.title: Overdue load by category
overdueByCategory.description: Group overdue charges by category to plan outreach.

lowStock.title: Inventory running low
lowStock.description: Active variants whose available stock is at or below the low-stock threshold.

outOfStock.title: Inventory out of stock
outOfStock.description: Variants where everything on hand is currently assigned to athletes.

byCategory.title: Inventory by category
byCategory.description: Variant count, stock and assignments grouped by inventory category.

assignedBySize.title: Active assignments by size
assignedBySize.description: Where the kit demand sits — sizes that are currently in use.

management.title: Management pack
management.subtitle: Curated, manager-friendly summaries pulled from your live data.

athlete.teamIdHint: Use 'is' to match the team UUID, or 'isNot' to find athletes outside that team.

reportBuilder.title: Report builder
reportBuilder.subtitle: Build, save, and export advanced reports across athletes, guardians, private lessons, and finance.
reportBuilder.welcomeTitle: Build a report in three calm steps.
reportBuilder.welcomeBody: Open a curated starter, tweak filters or grouping, then save the view or export to CSV. The whole experience stays inside this page.
reportBuilder.tipPickEntity: Pick what you want to look at — athletes, guardians, private lessons, or finance.
reportBuilder.tipFilterOrGroup: Add filters, or switch on grouping for one-dimension summaries.
reportBuilder.tipSaveOrExport: Save the view (just for you, or shared with the club) and export to CSV when needed.
reportBuilder.continueEyebrow: Pick up where you left off
reportBuilder.continueTitle: Open a saved view or jump back into a trusted starter.
reportBuilder.continueBody: Use the same explorer for saved club views, grouped summaries, and one-click starters so the next step is always obvious.
reportBuilder.entityPickerEyebrow: Or start fresh with one entity
reportBuilder.invalidPreset: Could not load the preset from the link — opening a blank explorer instead.

actionCenter.title: Action center
actionCenter.subtitle: A calm, actionable work queue for finance, family workflow, readiness, and schedule follow-up.
actionCenter.empty: No action-center items match these filters.
actionCenter.emptyHint: Clear filters or wait for the next operational follow-up signal.
actionCenter.emptyFilteredHint: No items match the current filters. Clear the filters or switch clubs to see the next operational workload.
actionCenter.workQueueHint: Use the grouped queue below to move from notification to the correct workflow quickly, without hunting across modules.
actionCenter.bulkHint: Use bulk actions for lightweight operational housekeeping only.

summaries.trainingAttendance: Attendance has not been recorded yet

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Stock and athlete-assignment for jerseys, sweatshirts, balls, and equipment.
inventory.newItemHint: Add a product to the catalogue, optionally with size or numbered variants.
inventory.fieldHasVariants: This item has size / number variants
inventory.deleteConfirm: Delete the inventory item "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
inventory.adjustDeltaInvalid: Enter a non-zero positive or negative integer.
inventory.noActiveAssignments: No athletes currently hold this item.
inventory.bulkReturnConfirm_one: Return the selected assignment to stock?
inventory.bulkReturnConfirm_other: Return all {{count}} selected assignments to stock?
inventory.emptyHint: Add your first item — a training jersey, sweatshirt, or balls bucket — to start tracking stock.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Administration, club context, and operating preferences.
settings.platformAdminHint: This account can see multiple clubs. Use this surface to verify seeded club density, then switch intentionally into the club you want to test.
settings.clubAdminHint: This account is scoped to one club. The selected club context below should match what the main app surfaces are loading.
settings.snapshotHint: These counts come from the real club overview endpoint and help confirm that the selected club is meaningfully populated.
settings.platformOverviewHint: Each visible club should feel populated enough for staging demos and now also shows whether it needs operational follow-through.
settings.platformActionMixEmpty: No action-center mix is visible for this club right now.
settings.preferencesHint: A lightweight settings surface keeps the product feeling real even before deeper configuration modules arrive.
settings.localePreference: Interface language follows the switcher in the header.
settings.notificationsPreference: Notifications are now staff-specific. Read, snooze, dismiss, and resolve actions only affect the signed-in staff member until the underlying issue changes again.
settings.securityHint: Staff access now uses secure server sessions and membership-based tenant scoping. Guardian portal access remains separate.
settings.securityPointStaff: Staff/admin actions require a staff session.
settings.securityPointMembership: Tenant access is filtered by membership, not only by frontend hiding.
settings.securityPointGuardian: Guardian sessions stay isolated from staff/admin sessions.

brandAdmin.title: Club branding
brandAdmin.subtitle: Tune how your club appears in the family portal. We keep layout, fonts, and accessibility shared across the product so families always feel at home.
brandAdmin.noTenant: Pick a club from the header to manage its branding.
brandAdmin.guardrailNote: Layout, fonts, and accessibility stay shared across all clubs.
brandAdmin.identityHint: How your club is named in the portal header and welcome card.
brandAdmin.displayNameHint: Shown next to your logo. Falls back to your club name.
brandAdmin.taglinePlaceholder: A few warm words about your club
brandAdmin.taglineHint: Optional. One line. Keep it calm — this sits under your club name.
brandAdmin.colorsHint: Two brand colours drive the brand mark, soft washes, and the welcome card. Pick colours that already feel like your club.
brandAdmin.contrastHelp: We pick the readable text colour automatically — but a warmer or darker shade often feels more confident in the portal.
brandAdmin.logoHint: Upload a small square or wordmark, or point at one you already host. Both options stay safely served behind your club.
brandAdmin.logoConstraints: PNG, JPG, or WEBP up to 1 MB. Square or near-square images render best.
brandAdmin.externalLogo: Or use a hosted logo URL
brandAdmin.externalLogoHint: Use https:// or a path beginning with /. The uploaded logo (if any) takes precedence.
brandAdmin.welcomeHint: A short, warm note for parents. Optional — leave blank for the calm default.
brandAdmin.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: What you'd like every family to feel when they open the portal.
brandAdmin.previewHint: Updates as you type. Layout and accessibility stay the same across all clubs.
brandAdmin.previewMessageFallback: Here is what your club is sharing with your family today.

clubUpdates.title: Club updates
clubUpdates.subtitle: Short, calm notes that appear in the family portal. Use this for the small handful of things that really help families this week.
clubUpdates.empty: No updates yet. The first one you publish will appear quietly on the family portal home.
clubUpdates.confirmDelete: Delete this update? Families will no longer see it.
clubUpdates.formGuardrail: Plain text only. Keep it short — families will see the first card on their phone.

fields.title: Title
fields.bodyPlaceholder: One short paragraph. What does the family need to know?

staffLogin.title: Sign in to Amateur
staffLogin.subtitle: A calm workspace for club managers, staff, and platform admins.
staffLogin.hint: Use your staff account to enter the platform. Your memberships decide which club contexts you can open after signing in.
staffLogin.sessionError: Your session could not be restored.
staffLogin.sessionBootstrapFailed: Sign-in succeeded, but the session could not be fully verified. Your club context has been loaded from the login response. If anything looks off, refresh the page.
staffLogin.helperBody: Staff access is now separated from the guardian portal and bound to real tenant memberships.
staffLogin.demoAccountsHint: Click to prefill credentials. All demo accounts use the same password.
staffLogin.platformNoticeBody: Global admins switch between clubs intentionally; club admins see only their own club.
staffLogin.guardianCta: Are you a guardian? Go to the family portal

action.submitSuccess: Your response was submitted for club review.
action.responseHint: Share only the information the club requested. Staff will review updates before they become authoritative.
action.readOnlyHint: This request is no longer waiting on your action.

imports.title: Import / Export
imports.subtitle: Move existing data into the platform with confidence — and pull practical lists back out.
imports.intro: Use these guided flows to bring athlete, guardian, and family data into the platform. Each import previews validation issues before any record is changed.
imports.templateHint: Open the template, fill it in, then paste it back below.
imports.uploadTitle: Paste your CSV or upload a file
imports.uploadHint: Drop a .csv file or paste rows from a spreadsheet. Headers on the first line.
imports.parsedHint: {{count}} rows parsed. Map each column below.
imports.mappingHint: Match your spreadsheet columns to the fields the platform understands. Required fields are marked.
imports.mappingRequiredMissing: Map every required field before previewing.
imports.previewHint: We do not change anything during preview. Resolve highlighted issues, then commit.
imports.previewEmpty: Run a preview once your columns are mapped.
imports.commitSuccess: Imported {{created}} new and updated {{updated}} existing record(s); {{skipped}} skipped.
imports.commitBlocked: Resolve the highlighted issues to enable import.
imports.defaultBranchHint: Used when a row leaves the sport branch column empty.

sportBranches.title: Sport branches
sportBranches.description: Set up the sports your club runs. Everything else (coaches, groups, teams, athletes) will reference these.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.description: Add the people who run trainings. Each coach belongs to one sport branch.
coaches.dependencies: Make sure your sport branches exist first.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Optional competitive squads. Useful for clubs that play in leagues; clubs that only train can skip this.
teams.dependencies: Sport branches are required. Linked groups and head coaches are optional but recommended.

athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.description: Bring your athlete roster into the platform with sport branch and group context.
athletes.dependencies: Import sport branches first. Groups are optional but recommended so athletes land in the right cohort.

guardians.title: Guardians
guardians.description: Add guardian contact details so families can be reached and linked to athletes.

athleteGuardians.title: Athlete ↔ guardian links
athleteGuardians.description: Connect existing athletes to existing guardians with relationship metadata.
athleteGuardians.dependencies: Athletes and guardians must already exist before you link them.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Create training groups in bulk so you can map athletes to them right away.
groups.dependencies: Sport branches are required first; head coaches are optional.

chargeItems.title: Finance starting items
chargeItems.description: Set up the dues, camps, and merchandise lines you'll bill families for.
chargeItems.dependencies: No dependencies — use this any time before you start issuing charges.

inventoryItems.title: Inventory & stock
inventoryItems.description: Bring jerseys, balls, and other club kit into the system with starting stock counts.
inventoryItems.dependencies: Sport branches are optional but help with branch-scoped reporting.

hints.sportBranch: Use the branch name or its short code.
hints.sportBranchOptional: Optional. Use the branch name or short code if the item is branch-specific.
hints.sportBranchCode: Short uppercase code for integrations, e.g. BASKETBALL.
hints.primaryGroup: Group must already exist in the chosen sport branch.
hints.headCoach: Match an existing coach by full name. Unknown names create the row without a head coach.
hints.teamGroup: Optional. Link the team to one of your existing groups for the same branch.
hints.chargeCategory: A short label, e.g. dues, camp, tournament, merchandise.
hints.amount: Use a decimal number, e.g. 750 or 1250.50.
hints.currency: Three-letter ISO currency code, e.g. TRY, EUR, USD.
hints.trackAssignment: Yes for items handed to a specific athlete (jerseys), no for pooled stock (balls, cones).
hints.initialStock: How many units you currently own. Leave blank for zero.
hints.lowStockThreshold: We'll quietly flag the item when available stock drops to this number.

imports.historyHint: A short, on-device record of the imports you committed from this browser.
imports.exportsHint: These are quick wrappers around the reporting engine. For advanced filtering use the Report Builder.

onboarding.title: Club onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: A guided way to bring your club into the platform — at your own pace, without surprises.
onboarding.loading: Reading where your club is right now…
onboarding.loadFailed: Could not load the onboarding overview.
onboarding.blocked: Finish {{steps}} first so this step has something to reference.

lastImport.title: Last import for this step
lastImport.attention: {{rejected}} rejected · {{warnings}} warning(s) — review before relying on this step.

history.title: Recent imports
history.hint: A short, supportive memory of what your club has brought in recently.
history.empty: Nothing imported yet. Once you commit a step, it will appear here.
history.attention: {{rejected}} row(s) were rejected · {{warnings}} warning(s) — open the step to review.

readiness.noSignals: No issues stand out. Everything looks calm and consistent.

headline.almost_ready: You're close. A couple of things still need attention.
headline.ready: You look ready to invite families.

subtitle.fresh: Start with club basics and sport branches; the rest builds on top.
subtitle.in_progress: Finish the remaining required steps and the wizard will guide you to go-live.
subtitle.almost_ready: Required steps are done. The notes below are gentle nudges, not blockers.
subtitle.ready: Required steps are done and nothing concerning stands out.

signals.brandMissing: Add a club name, primary colour, and (optional) logo so families recognise you.
signals.athletesWithoutGroups: Athletes are loaded but no training groups exist yet — families will see them without a cohort.
signals.linksMissing: Athletes and guardians are loaded, but no families are linked yet. Families won't see their athletes.
signals.lowAthleteCount: Only {{count}} athlete(s) on file — double-check that the import covered everyone.
signals.rejectedRows: {{count}} row(s) were rejected in the last import for this step. Re-open the step to review.

club_basics.title: Club basics
club_basics.hint: Take a moment to confirm how your club is named and how the family portal will look. You can refine this any time.

sport_branches.title: Sport branches
sport_branches.hint: List the sports your club runs. Everything else (coaches, groups, athletes) plugs into these.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.hint: Add the people who lead trainings. Each coach belongs to one sport branch.

groups.title: Groups
groups.hint: Training cohorts (for example U10 Basketball). Athletes will land in one of these.

teams.title: Teams
teams.hint: Optional competitive squads. Skip this step if your club only runs trainings.

athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.hint: Bring in your athlete roster. Sport branch is required; group is recommended.

guardians.title: Guardians
guardians.hint: Add parent and guardian contact details so you can reach families later.

athlete_guardians.title: Athlete ↔ guardian links
athlete_guardians.hint: Connect each athlete to one or more guardians and mark the primary contact.

charge_items.title: Finance starter
charge_items.hint: Define the dues, camps, and merchandise lines you'll bill families for.

inventory_items.title: Inventory & stock
inventory_items.hint: Bring jerseys, balls, and other club kit into the system with starting stock counts.

go_live.title: Review & go live
go_live.hint: A short checklist before you tell families you're ready.

clubBasics.title: Confirm your club identity
clubBasics.hint: Set how your club is named and how the family portal will look. You can refine this any time.
clubBasics.bulletBranding: Add your club name, primary colour, and logo for the family portal.

goLive.title: You're almost ready
goLive.hint: These quick links open the surfaces your club will live in day-to-day.
goLive.bulletReview: Skim each section once to confirm what came in is what you expected.
goLive.bulletInvite: Invite the rest of your staff so the work isn't on one person.
goLive.bulletCommunicate: When you're ready, share the family portal link with your community.
goLive.requiredEmpty: Each required step contributes to a club families can use. Reopen any step that looks unsettled.
goLive.optionalEmpty: Optional steps don't block go-live, but they save work later.
goLive.nextStepsTitle: When you're ready to invite families
goLive.nextStepsHint: These are the safe next moves once required steps look settled.

landing.headline: Run your club with calm confidence.
landing.sub: One place for groups, teams, schedules, and money — without the clutter.
landing.staffCardBody: Enter the club operating system with role-aware access, membership-based tenant context, and a calm admin shell.
landing.guardianCardBody: Use the separate family portal for invitations, family actions, and athlete-linked updates.

portal.subtitle: A calm, club-branded space for your family.

login.title: Sign in to your family space
login.subtitle: A warm, private view for your family.
login.hint: Use the email your club has on file. We will only show you the athletes and requests linked to your family.
login.invitationHint: New here? Your club will send you an activation link by email — there is no public sign-up.
login.signedOutHint: You're signed out. This view is for parents and guardians of club athletes.

activate.title: Set up your family access
activate.subtitle: A one-time setup, just for you.
activate.hint: Create a password you'll remember. Next time, sign in with this email and password to see your family's portal.
activate.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Choose something only you would know.
activate.invalidLink: This invite link is no longer valid. Please ask your club for a fresh one.
activate.errorMismatch: The two passwords don't match yet.
activate.safetyNote: Only the family invited by your club can use this link.

home.title: Family portal
home.subtitle: Your family's calm view of the club.
home.welcomeFallback: Here is what your club is sharing with your family today.
home.empty: We don't have anything to show yet — please check back later.
home.attentionHint: We only show items that need a small action from you.
home.awaitingReviewLine: {{count}} item(s) are being reviewed by the club.
home.financeLine: {{outstanding}} child(ren) has an open balance ({{overdue}} overdue).
home.allClearBody: There is nothing waiting on you right now. We'll let you know if anything comes up.
home.todayHint: What is on your family's schedule today.
home.familyHint: A short summary for each athlete linked to your account.
home.familyEmpty: No athletes are linked to your account yet — your club will add them soon.
home.allRequestsHint: Everything the club has shared with your family, in one place.
home.updatesPlaceholder: When your club posts a new announcement, it will appear quietly right here.
home.clubUpdatesHint: Short, calm notes from your club
